title: ayenia velutina
intro: Ayenia velutina, also known as the "Velvet Ayenia" or "Velvet Leaf," is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Ayenia velutina is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal infusions.
